subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thy Beauty was manifested, Thy proof did shine forth, and Thy names dawned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به ظهر جمالک و طلع برهانک و لاح اسمائک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
